notes: Phase 1 (cockpit shell) can start immediately â€” no contract changes needed.
Phase 3 (public platform) depends on shared component promotion (early Phase 2).
Govern renamed to Community (RiTeamLine icon). 60 decisions logged.
Spatial/circular layouts deferred to future iteration.

ui.handoff_note: Claude sessions use kickoff prompts from orchestration.md (per-phase sections)

state_api.coordination_note: Phase 1a: state_api (extend useAdminStore, useEffectiveToolbarPermissions, offlineFirst) and ui (components, layout) run in parallel. ui consumes the permissions hook â€” coordinate via interface contract (hook return type). ui lane reads scope via `useAdminStore(s => s.selectedGarden?.id)` (Garden object, not plain Address). Phase 2+: state_api depends on ui lane completion.
state_api.handoff_note: Each Codex task is a copy-paste prompt block organized by phase

history.details: Deep design exploration completed. 12 key decisions logged. 3-phase plan defined.
Gap analysis resolved 7 inconsistencies, 8 gaps, 5 open questions. 25 decisions now logged. Govern renamed to Community. Route consolidation finalized. Documents updated.

Codebase validation revealed 3 critical and 4 moderate gaps. Amendments: D30 (useEffectiveToolbarPermissions â€” resolves two-tier role model via indexer data), D31 (PlatformRouter branches on isStandalone not isMobile), D32 (/gardens public and /home auth'd coexist), D33 (command palette route update moved to Phase 1). Added PublicShell/SiteHeader/AuthHeader for Phase 3 client route integration. Added SheetErrorBoundary, TopContextBar context label, AppBar display-mode CSS guard. Promoted TxInlineFeedback and getDepositLimitLabel to Phase 2. Moved VaultPositionCard earlier in Phase 2. 33 decisions total. ~21 new acceptance criteria added to eval.

Comprehensive gap analysis resolved 4 open questions: strategiesâ†’treasury (D26), submit-workâ†’side sheet (D27), phase 3â†’extend client (D28), redirectsâ†’spec now (D29). 24-row route redirect map added to spec. Component promotion language corrected (GardenCard/WorkCard/StatusBadge already in shared). Eval expanded with 7 new AC. 29 decisions total.

Final review resolved 4 open questions (D34-D37: VaultPositionCard is new read-only, FAB shows active tab icon, Phase 2 CTA uses existing create route, /fund is deposit-only). Fixed 6 gaps: useRolePermissions composition corrected, PostHog moved to Phase 1b, Phase 1 split into 1a/1b, test strategy added, gallery breakpoints aligned, hook name corrected (useVaultDepositâ†’useVaultOperations). 8 minor issues fixed. 37 decisions total.

Deep codebase validation (4 parallel agents) found 4 gaps and 6 minor issues. D38: useGardens needs offlineFirst via createBaseListHook factory extension. D39: spec corrected useVaultOperationsâ†’useVaultDeposit (actual shared export). D40: cross-garden queue sort = FIFO by createdAt + status-tier grouping. D41: all M3 components in shared with shared Storybook (one instance). Minor fixes: data-appbar note, StatusBadge story cleanup, SUB_ROUTE_LABELS extraction, Phase 1a shippability note, i18n string estimates. Feature flag declined â€” git revert is sufficient. 41 decisions total.

Final gap analysis with 4-agent codebase validation. Resolved 2 open questions (Q1: UserProfileâ†’TopContextBar+SettingsSheet, Q2: AssetSelector confirmed existing in shared). 4 new decisions: D42 (UserProfile migration), D43 (FAB eliminated â€” TopContextBar makes it redundant), D44 (useCrossGardenQueue client-side merge hook), D45 (AssetSelector confirmed). 3 medium gaps closed: cross-garden queue data strategy, SettingsSheet content enumeration, test fixture update task. 8 low gaps addressed: /impact eval AC, StatusBadge clarification, mobile keyboard task, a11y audit tasks, bundle analysis task, Phase 3 rollback strategy, PostHog dashboard note, cookie-jars orphan. 45 decisions total.

Full codebase validation (3 parallel agents: admin, shared, client). 12 fixes applied: D35 struck (superseded by D43), FAB req marked n/a, PostHog tracking corrected (usePageView is reactive â€” no code change, ops dashboard update only), useAdminStore.Garden expansion dropped (useGardens returns full DomainGarden), conditional redirect complexity noted, StatusBadge corrected (generic not ops-specific), SettingsSheet phase split clarified (shell in 1a, deployer in 1b), /impact eval criteria added, Settings removed from garden chip dropdown, Phase 3 feature flag removed (git revert sufficient), i18n estimate raised to ~40-45, SUB_ROUTE_LABELS pruning noted. All open questions resolved. Plan rated implementation-ready.

Final plan review with deep codebase validation (2 parallel agents: spec references + route/architecture). 3 critical gaps resolved: D46 (useAdminStore must be created â€” does not exist in codebase, was assumed), PostHog ops lane orphan reassigned to ui, state_apiâ†”ui circular dependency fixed (parallel in Phase 1a with interface contract). 6 medium gaps resolved: D47 (single-garden chip behavior), D48 (side sheet browser history push/pop), D49 (z-index stacking hierarchy), route-labels task rewritten (extractionâ†’creation), stale garden recovery guard, brief hook count corrected (1â†’3). Eval split into Phase 1a/1b sections, 7 missing criteria added. 49 decisions total.

Final gap resolution with 3-agent codebase validation (admin, shared, client). 36/38 assumptions validated. 1 critical resolved: D50 (garden chip dropdown contradiction â€” chip is purely garden switcher, no Settings/Actions). 4 high resolved: D51 (audit fixes separate PR), D52 (Deployment 958-line god object decomposed into 3 sub-components in Phase 1b), D53 (dead code cleanup task added), D54 (PostHog moved to Manual/Human Tasks). 5 medium resolved: D55 (Phase 1a empty state defined), D56 (i18n English-only, translate later), D57 (feature branch + separate merge commits), D58 (SyncStatusBar eval removed), D59 (toolbar permissions error state: all visible + toast). 1 low resolved: D60 (InstallCta location clarified). 60 decisions total. All documents updated. Plan execution-ready.

Independent plan review found 1 critical, 2 high, 3 medium issues. C1: useAdminStore already exists in packages/shared/src/stores/useAdminStore.ts (D46 said it didn't) â€” all references updated to 'extend existing', store location corrected (shared not admin), selectedGarden typed as Garden object not Address. H1: interface contract added â€” ui lane reads selectedGarden?.id for scope. H2: brief corrected from '3 new hooks/stores' to '2 new + 1 extended'. M2: eval regression criterion added for 5 existing useAdminStore consumers. M3: eval criterion added for createBaseListHook factory blast radius. status.json decision count corrected (49â†’60).
